debug_info.goal:
x a : Fin 4 → ℝ
h₀ : Function.Injective a
h₁ : ∀ (i : Fin 4), ∑ j, |a i - a j| * x j = 1
⊢ (x 0, x 1, x 2, x 3) = Imo1966P5.solution_fun (a 0, a 1, a 2, a 3)

proof:
let s := ![a 0, a 1, a 2, a 3]
  let ai := s.min' (by simp)
  let al := s.max' (by simp)
  have hmin : ∀ k, ai ≤ s k := fun k => s.min'_le _ (by simp)
  have hmax : ∀ k, s k ≤ al := fun k => s.le_max' _ (by simp)
  let i := s.findIdx (· = ai)
  let l := s.findIdx (· = al)
  have hi : s i = ai := List.findIdx_get (by simp)
  have hl : s l = al := List.findIdx_get (by simp)
  have neq : i ≠ l := by intro h; rw [h, hi, hl] at h₀; exact h₀ rfl
  have hx : ∀ k, x k = if k = i ∨ k = l then (1 / (al - ai)) else 0 := by
    intro k
    by_cases hk : k = i ∨ k = l
    · cases' hk with hk hk
      · have eq1 : ∑ j, |a i - a j| * x j = |a i - a i| * x i + |a i - a l| * x l + ∑ j ∈ ({0,1,2,3} \ {i,l}), |a i - a j| * x j := by
          simp [Fin.sum_univ_four, hk, neq.symm]
        have eq2 : |a i - a i| * x i + |a i - a l| * x l = (al - ai) * x l := by
          simp [hi, hl, abs_of_nonneg (sub_nonneg_of_le (hmax l))]
        have eq3 : ∑ j ∈ ({0,1,2,3} \ {i,l}), |a i - a j| * x j = 0 := by
          apply Finset.sum_eq_zero; intro j hj
          simp [Finset.mem_erase, Finset.mem_singleton] at hj
          simp [hj.1, hj.2]
        rw [eq1, eq2, eq3, h₁] at hk
        simp [hk, neq.symm, sub_ne_zero_of_ne (Ne.symm (h₀ (by rw [hi, hl]; exact hk)))]
      · have eq1 : ∑ j, |a l - a j| * x j = |a l - a i| * x i + |a l - a l| * x l + ∑ j ∈ ({0,1,2,3} \ {i,l}), |a l - a j| * x j := by
          simp [Fin.sum_univ_four, hk, neq]
        have eq2 : |a l - a i| * x i + |a l - a l| * x l = (al - ai) * x i := by
          simp [hi, hl, abs_of_nonneg (sub_nonneg_of_le (hmax l))]
        have eq3 : ∑ j ∈ ({0,1,2,3} \ {i,l}), |a l - a j| * x j = 0 := by
          apply Finset.sum_eq_zero; intro j hj
          simp [Finset.mem_erase, Finset.mem_singleton] at hj
          simp [hj.1, hj.2]
        rw [eq1, eq2, eq3, h₁] at hk
        simp [hk, neq, sub_ne_zero_of_ne (h₀ (by rw [hi, hl]; exact hk))]
    · have eq : ∑ j, |a k - a j| * x j = |a k - a i| * x i + |a k - a l| * x l + ∑ j ∈ ({0,1,2,3} \ {i,l}), |a k - a j| * x j := by
          simp [Fin.sum_univ_four, hk, neq.symm]
      have eq2 : |a k - a i| * x i + |a k - a l| * x l = 0 := by simp [hk]
      have eq3 : ∑ j ∈ ({0,1,2,3} \ {i,l}), |a k - a j| * x j = 0 := by
          apply Finset.sum_eq_zero; intro j hj
          simp [Finset.mem_erase, Finset.mem_singleton] at hj
          simp [hj.1, hj.2]
      rw [eq, eq2, eq3, h₁] at hk
      simp [hk]
  simp [solution_fun, hx]
